requirement_topic.en: Energy Performance / MEPS — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Mozambique energy programmes; NM/IEC 62552)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效性能/最低能效（MEPS）——家用制冷器具（莫桑比克能效方案；NM/IEC 62552）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效性能/最低能效（MEPS）——家用製冷器具（莫三比克能效方案；NM/IEC 62552）

summary.en: Mozambique does not operate a fully consolidated EU-style Ecodesign regulation with a single legally binding Energy Efficiency Index (EEI) gate for refrigerators. Energy efficiency is pursued through national energy programmes and standards work led by the Ministry responsible for energy and supported by INNOQ standardisation, increasingly in the Southern African Development Community (SADC) regional context, which is harmonising minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) and labelling for appliances including refrigerators. The technical measurement basis is the IEC 62552 series (household refrigerating appliances — characteristics and test methods), adopted as the corresponding NM standard. Where a MEPS / labelling requirement is in force or being introduced, refrigerators would need energy-consumption testing to IEC 62552 and may need to meet a minimum performance threshold and carry an energy label. Exporters should confirm the current status of Mozambique / SADC refrigerator MEPS and labelling with INNOQ and the energy ministry before shipment, as this is an emerging and evolving area.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克没有欧盟式完整统一的生态设计法规，缺乏针对冰箱的单一具法律约束力的能效指数（EEI）门槛。能效通过由负责能源的部委主导、INNOQ标准化支持的国家能效方案及标准工作推进，并日益置于南部非洲发展共同体（SADC）区域框架下，该框架正在协调包括冰箱在内的器具最低能效标准（MEPS）和标识。技术测量基础为IEC 62552系列（家用制冷器具——特性和试验方法），以相应NM标准形式采纳。在MEPS/标识要求已生效或正在引入之处，冰箱须依据IEC 62552进行能耗测试，并可能须满足最低性能门槛及加贴能效标签。出口商应在出货前向INNOQ及能源部委确认莫桑比克/SADC冰箱MEPS及标识的现行状态，因为这是一个正在形成和演变的领域。
summary.zht: 莫三比克沒有歐盟式完整統一的生態設計法規，缺乏針對冰箱的單一具法律約束力的能效指數（EEI）門檻。能效透過由負責能源的部委主導、INNOQ標準化支持的國家能效方案及標準工作推進，並日益置於南部非洲發展共同體（SADC）區域框架下，該框架正在協調包括冰箱在內的器具最低能效標準（MEPS）和標識。技術測量基礎為IEC 62552系列（家用製冷器具——特性和試驗方法），以相應NM標準形式採納。在MEPS/標識要求已生效或正在引入之處，冰箱須依據IEC 62552進行能耗測試，並可能須滿足最低性能門檻及加貼能效標籤。出口商應在出貨前向INNOQ及能源部委確認莫三比克/SADC冰箱MEPS及標識的現行狀態，因為這是一個正在形成和演變的領域。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (adopted as the corresponding NM standard via INNOQ; measurement basis for any MEPS / labelling)
SADC regional MEPS and energy-labelling harmonisation programme for appliances (refrigerators in scope) — regional framework Mozambique participates in
Mozambique national energy-efficiency programmes — led by the Ministry responsible for energy with INNOQ standardisation support (status to be confirmed)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators). It sets energy efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy consumption limits, and is enforced by SAMR under the China Energy Label system administered with NDRC. Products must display the China Energy Label (CEL) before sale. China's test methodology aligns with the IEC 62552 series, so the underlying measurement basis is comparable to what Mozambique would adopt; however, Chinese energy grades and any Mozambique/SADC MEPS threshold are not directly equivalent, and a Chinese CEL grade does not by itself satisfy a Mozambique labelling requirement.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级）。该标准规定能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值，由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过与国家发展改革委（NDRC）共同管理的中国能效标识制度执行。产品在销售前须展示中国能效标识（CEL）。中国试验方法与IEC 62552系列一致，故底层测量基础与莫桑比克将采纳者可比；但中国能效等级与任何莫桑比克/SADC MEPS门槛不直接等同，且中国CEL等级本身不满足莫桑比克标识要求。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級）。該標準規定能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值，由市場監管總局（SAMR）透過與國家發展改革委（NDRC）共同管理的中國能效標識制度執行。產品在銷售前須展示中國能效標識（CEL）。中國試驗方法與IEC 62552系列一致，故底層測量基礎與莫三比克將採納者可比；但中國能效等級與任何莫三比克/SADC MEPS門檻不直接等同，且中國CEL等級本身不滿足莫三比克標識要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: The energy gap is different in nature from the EU: rather than a hard EEI/EPREL gate, Mozambique presents an emerging and evolving MEPS/labelling picture. Practical gaps for a Chinese exporter: (1) Threshold uncertainty — whether a minimum energy performance threshold currently applies to imported refrigerators, and at what level, must be confirmed with INNOQ / the energy ministry; a Chinese Grade 1-3 CEL rating does not automatically map to any Mozambique/SADC threshold. (2) Test basis — energy data should be on the IEC 62552 series basis (which China's GB 12021.2 / GB/T 8059 broadly align with), so test data is largely reusable but should be presented against the adopted NM/IEC 62552. (3) Labelling — if/when a Mozambique or SADC energy label applies, the Chinese CEL label cannot substitute and a compliant local-format label (Portuguese) would be required. Because the regime is developing, exporters should treat this as a watch item and verify current status before each shipment cycle.
gap.zh: 能效差距在性质上与欧盟不同：莫桑比克并非硬性EEI/EPREL门槛，而是一个正在形成和演变的MEPS/标识图景。中国出口商的实际差距：（1）门槛不确定性——目前进口冰箱是否适用最低能效门槛及其水平，须向INNOQ/能源部委确认；中国CEL 1-3级评定不自动对应任何莫桑比克/SADC门槛。（2）测试基础——能效数据应基于IEC 62552系列（中国GB 12021.2 / GB/T 8059与之大体一致），故测试数据大体可复用，但应依据所采纳的NM/IEC 62552呈现。（3）标识——若/当莫桑比克或SADC能效标签适用时，中国CEL标识不能替代，须提供符合本地格式（葡萄牙语）的标签。由于制度仍在发展，出口商应将此视为关注项，并在每个出货周期前核实现行状态。
gap.zht: 能效差距在性質上與歐盟不同：莫三比克並非硬性EEI/EPREL門檻，而是一個正在形成和演變的MEPS/標識圖景。中國出口商的實際差距：（1）門檻不確定性——目前進口冰箱是否適用最低能效門檻及其水平，須向INNOQ/能源部委確認；中國CEL 1-3級評定不自動對應任何莫三比克/SADC門檻。（2）測試基礎——能效數據應基於IEC 62552系列（中國GB 12021.2 / GB/T 8059與之大體一致），故測試數據大體可複用，但應依據所採納的NM/IEC 62552呈現。（3）標識——若/當莫三比克或SADC能效標籤適用時，中國CEL標識不能替代，須提供符合本地格式（葡萄牙語）的標籤。由於制度仍在發展，出口商應將此視為關注項，並在每個出貨週期前核實現行狀態。

mandatory_status.target: Emerging — Mozambique has no consolidated EU-style mandatory EEI gate; MEPS / energy-labelling for refrigerators is developing nationally and via SADC regional harmonisation, on the IEC 62552 measurement basis. Current applicability and thresholds must be confirmed with INNOQ / the energy ministry.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: INNOQ — Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade (Mozambique) / SADC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mozambique has no EU-style mandatory EEI/EPREL gate for refrigerators; energy MEPS and labelling are emerging nationally and via SADC regional harmonisation, on the IEC 62552 basis that China's GB 12021.2 broadly aligns with (so test data is largely reusable). Treat thresholds and labelling as a watch item: confirm current Mozambique / SADC refrigerator MEPS status with INNOQ and the energy ministry before each shipment, and provide any required label in Portuguese.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莫桑比克没有欧盟式针对冰箱的强制EEI/EPREL门槛；能效MEPS和标识正在国家层面及通过SADC区域协调形成，基于中国GB 12021.2大体一致的IEC 62552基础（故测试数据大体可复用）。应将门槛和标识视为关注项：每次出货前向INNOQ及能源部委确认莫桑比克/SADC冰箱MEPS现行状态，并以葡萄牙语提供任何须附标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 莫三比克沒有歐盟式針對冰箱的強制EEI/EPREL門檻；能效MEPS和標識正在國家層面及透過SADC區域協調形成，基於中國GB 12021.2大體一致的IEC 62552基礎（故測試數據大體可複用）。應將門檻和標識視為關注項：每次出貨前向INNOQ及能源部委確認莫三比克/SADC冰箱MEPS現行狀態，並以葡萄牙語提供任何須附標籤。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — Mozambique / SADC Energy Label (status emerging) vs China Energy Label
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——莫桑比克/SADC能效标签（状态形成中）对比中国能效标识
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——莫三比克/SADC能效標籤（狀態形成中）對比中國能效標識

summary.en: Mozambique does not yet operate a mature, consolidated mandatory energy-label scheme for refrigerators equivalent to the EU A-to-G label and EPREL database. Energy-labelling for appliances is being advanced through national policy and the SADC regional Standards and Labelling (S&L) harmonisation programme, which aims to introduce comparative energy labels and MEPS across member states using the IEC 62552 measurement basis. Where a comparative or endorsement label is introduced for refrigerators, the supplier would be expected to test the model to IEC 62552, determine its energy class/consumption, and display a compliant label (in Portuguese) at point of sale. There is, at present, no EPREL-style mandatory central pre-registration database obligation analogous to the EU. Exporters should confirm with INNOQ and the energy ministry whether a refrigerator energy label is currently required, its format, and any registration/notification step before market placement.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克尚未运行成熟、统一的针对冰箱的强制能效标签方案，缺乏等同欧盟A至G标签及EPREL数据库的制度。器具能效标识正通过国家政策及SADC区域标准与标识（S&L）协调方案推进，该方案旨在以IEC 62552测量基础在成员国引入比较型能效标签和MEPS。在针对冰箱引入比较型或认可型标签之处，供应商须依据IEC 62552测试型号、确定其能效等级/能耗，并在销售点展示符合规定的标签（葡萄牙语）。目前不存在类似欧盟EPREL的强制中央预注册数据库义务。出口商应向INNOQ及能源部委确认目前是否须为冰箱提供能效标签、其格式以及投放市场前的任何注册/通报步骤。
summary.zht: 莫三比克尚未運行成熟、統一的針對冰箱的強制能效標籤方案，缺乏等同歐盟A至G標籤及EPREL數據庫的制度。器具能效標識正透過國家政策及SADC區域標準與標識（S&L）協調方案推進，該方案旨在以IEC 62552測量基礎在成員國引入比較型能效標籤和MEPS。在針對冰箱引入比較型或認可型標籤之處，供應商須依據IEC 62552測試型號、確定其能效等級/能耗，並在銷售點展示符合規定的標籤（葡萄牙語）。目前不存在類似歐盟EPREL的強制中央預登記數據庫義務。出口商應向INNOQ及能源部委確認目前是否須為冰箱提供能效標籤、其格式以及投放市場前的任何登記/通報步驟。

standards_or_laws: SADC Standards and Labelling (S&L) harmonisation programme — comparative energy labels + MEPS for appliances including refrigerators (IEC 62552 basis)
IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (adopted as the corresponding NM standard via INNOQ; basis for any label energy class)
Mozambique national energy-efficiency / labelling policy — Ministry responsible for energy with INNOQ (label format and applicability to be confirmed)

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, revised 2016). The CEL displays a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest, 5 minimum) and annual energy consumption; it is administered by the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS) under NDRC/SAMR, with manufacturers self-declaring grade based on GB 12021.2 testing. There is no EPREL-style pre-registration database. Structurally, the CEL is a comparative label like those Mozambique/SADC are introducing, and both rest on the IEC 62552 measurement family — but the grade scales differ and the CEL is not cross-recognised; a destination-format label would be required where Mozambique mandates one.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为中国能效标识（CEL），依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修订）实施。CEL展示1至5级评级（1级最高，5级最低）及年耗电量；由NDRC/SAMR下属中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理，制造商依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明等级。无类似EPREL的预注册数据库。结构上，CEL与莫桑比克/SADC正在引入的标签同为比较型标签，且均基于IEC 62552测量体系——但等级量表不同且CEL不被互认；在莫桑比克要求时须提供目的地格式标签。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為中國能效標識（CEL），依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修訂）實施。CEL展示1至5級評級（1級最高，5級最低）及年耗電量；由NDRC/SAMR下屬中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理，製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明等級。無類似EPREL的預登記數據庫。結構上，CEL與莫三比克/SADC正在引入的標籤同為比較型標籤，且均基於IEC 62552測量體系——但等級量表不同且CEL不被互認；在莫三比克要求時須提供目的地格式標籤。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: Compared with the EU's two hard gates (EPREL pre-registration + A-to-G label), Mozambique's labelling picture is lighter and still emerging: (1) No EPREL-style central pre-registration database currently exists, so there is no EU-style mandatory pre-shipment registration gate — this is a structural area where Mozambique lacks an EU horizontal regime. (2) A comparative energy label may be required where the national/SADC scheme is in force; if so, the Chinese CEL (1-to-5 scale) cannot substitute, and a destination-format Portuguese label derived from IEC 62552 testing would be needed. (3) Because the test basis (IEC 62552) is shared with China's GB 12021.2 / GB/T 8059, the underlying energy data is largely reusable — the gap is label format, language, and confirming current applicability. Exporters should verify with INNOQ / the energy ministry whether a refrigerator energy label is presently mandatory and obtain the official format before market placement.
gap.zh: 与欧盟两道硬门槛（EPREL预注册+A至G标签）相比，莫桑比克的标识图景较轻且仍在形成中：（1）目前不存在类似EPREL的中央预注册数据库，因此无欧盟式强制发货前注册门槛——这是莫桑比克缺乏欧盟横向制度的结构性领域。（2）在国家/SADC方案生效之处可能须提供比较型能效标签；若如此，中国CEL（1至5级）不能替代，须提供源自IEC 62552测试的目的地格式葡萄牙语标签。（3）由于测试基础（IEC 62552）与中国GB 12021.2 / GB/T 8059共享，底层能效数据大体可复用——差距在于标签格式、语言及确认现行适用性。出口商应向INNOQ/能源部委核实目前是否强制要求冰箱能效标签，并在投放市场前取得官方格式。
gap.zht: 與歐盟兩道硬門檻（EPREL預登記+A至G標籤）相比，莫三比克的標識圖景較輕且仍在形成中：（1）目前不存在類似EPREL的中央預登記數據庫，因此無歐盟式強制發貨前登記門檻——這是莫三比克缺乏歐盟橫向制度的結構性領域。（2）在國家/SADC方案生效之處可能須提供比較型能效標籤；若如此，中國CEL（1至5級）不能替代，須提供源自IEC 62552測試的目的地格式葡萄牙語標籤。（3）由於測試基礎（IEC 62552）與中國GB 12021.2 / GB/T 8059共享，底層能效數據大體可複用——差距在於標籤格式、語言及確認現行適用性。出口商應向INNOQ/能源部委核實目前是否強制要求冰箱能效標籤，並在投放市場前取得官方格式。

mandatory_status.target: Emerging / to be confirmed — no EPREL-style mandatory pre-registration database; a comparative energy label may apply where the national / SADC S&L scheme is in force. Confirm current refrigerator-label applicability and official format with INNOQ / the energy ministry.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mozambique has no EPREL-style mandatory pre-registration database for refrigerators (an EU horizontal regime it lacks); any comparative energy label is emerging via national policy and the SADC S&L programme on the IEC 62552 basis. Chinese CEL grades and data are largely reusable for testing but the CEL label itself does not substitute for any Mozambique/SADC label. Confirm current label applicability and official Portuguese format with INNOQ / the energy ministry before market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莫桑比克没有类似EPREL的针对冰箱的强制预注册数据库（其缺乏的欧盟横向制度）；任何比较型能效标签正通过国家政策及SADC S&L方案在IEC 62552基础上形成。中国CEL等级和数据在测试上大体可复用，但CEL标签本身不能替代任何莫桑比克/SADC标签。投放市场前请向INNOQ/能源部委确认现行标签适用性及官方葡萄牙语格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 莫三比克沒有類似EPREL的針對冰箱的強制預登記數據庫（其缺乏的歐盟橫向制度）；任何比較型能效標籤正透過國家政策及SADC S&L方案在IEC 62552基礎上形成。中國CEL等級和數據在測試上大體可複用，但CEL標籤本身不能替代任何莫三比克/SADC標籤。投放市場前請向INNOQ/能源部委確認現行標籤適用性及官方葡萄牙語格式。
